course.title: React Native Fundamentals
course.description: Learn the basics of React Native development with hands-on projects and real-world applications. This comprehensive course covers everything from setting up your development environment to deploying your first mobile app.
course.category_description: Build mobile applications for iOS and Android
course.instructor_bio: Senior Mobile Developer with 8+ years of experience building React Native applications for Fortune 500 companies.
requirements: Mobile device or emulator for testing
outcomes: Build mobile apps with React Native
Understand component lifecycle and state management
Integrate with device features like camera and GPS
Deploy apps to App Store and Google Play

reviews.review: Excellent course! Sarah explains concepts clearly and the projects are very practical.
Great content, but would like more advanced topics covered.

data.title: Environment Setup Quiz

questions.question_text: What is React Native primarily used for?
questions.explanation: React Native is a framework for building native mobile applications using React.

questions.question_text: Which command is used to create a new React Native project?
questions.explanation: The standard command to initialize a new React Native project is 'npx react-native init'.

questions.question_text: Do you need to install Node.js to develop React Native apps?
questions.explanation: Node.js is required as it provides npm and the JavaScript runtime.
JSX stands for JavaScript XML and allows you to write HTML-like code in JavaScript.

questions.question_text: Can React Native apps run on both iOS and Android?
questions.explanation: React Native enables cross-platform development for both iOS and Android.

data.review: Great course! Very comprehensive and well-structured.
